item.title: Ballot bungle resolved: One Nation retains seat of Narungga after 81 missing votes are counted
item.description: The ballots were discovered earlier this week inside three sealed boxes.

item.title: Soaring farm costs spark warnings of major price hikes for meat
item.description: ‘If things don’t turn around, many farmers could be forced to cut production.’

item.title: Young gun Kai Allen salutes in New Zealand for first Supercars win
item.description: The 20-year-old kept championship leader Brodie Kostecki at bay in a historic race in Christchurch.

item.title: Season-ending fears for gun ball-winner Gryan Miers as Geelong investigate
item.description: The club is investigating the situation after originally thinking it was a minor issue.

item.title: Essendon president Andrew Welsh at the centre of ‘chaotic’ citizen’s arrest on the Gold Coast
item.description: Witnesses were amazed when a ute crashed into a bus stop and an unlikley hero came out of nowhere.

item.title: ‘President at 21’: Meet the Australian running a self-declared state from exile after being deported from claimed land
item.description: Hundreds of people have been granted citizenship despite legal doubts.

item.title: Reigning Bathurst champ Matt Payne breaks through for ‘epic’ first win of Supercars season
item.description: It was an impressive recovery after he struck disaster in the day’s first race in Christchurch.

item.title: Radiology industry under scrutiny after missed cancer diagnosis and warning over unregistered MRI staff
item.description: An industry body says current practice ‘undermines the safety standards expected within the Australian healthcare system’.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Australian War Memorial reveals long-term plan for Ben Roberts-Smith display
item.description: The former SAS soldier is on bail after being charged with five counts of war crime murder.

item.title: How old is too old to breastfeed? An expert weighs in as Rumer Willis faces criticism
item.description: The actress hit back at condemnation of her choice to nurse her three-year-old daughter.

item.title: Questions on human rights records and Russian oil hang over Anthony Albanese’s fuel supply deals
item.description: The PM and other world leaders are crossing the globe to secure fuel deals. But are they crossing the line?

item.title: ‘Shocked’ Max Verstappen mourns death of fellow driver Juha Miettinen in Nurburgring Nordschleife race
item.description: The motorsport world is grieving following a devastating seven-car crash at the Nurburgring.

item.title: Victorian Premier Jacinta Allan to extend free public transport for a month and then slash fares
item.description: The move will save the average commuter more than $850.

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: ‘Human predators’ living amongst us and the careers they’re drawn to
item.description: ‘In a way, they’re almost like a different species to us.’

item.title: Supercars champions Chaz Mostert and Brodie Kostecki collide at high speed in fiery fight for Jason Richards Trophy
item.description: Officials acted quickly to lay the blame as a key rival pounced in the dramatic final two laps.

item.title: Six dead in Ukraine shooting after gunman opens fire and takes hostages in Kyiv supermarket
item.description: The shooter, a 58-year-old man born in Moscow, is also dead.

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: The stunning percentage of ‘human predators’ who walk among us
item.description: ‘They see themselves as superior because they don’t experience fear.’

item.title: Liam Bartlett: Australia’s energy security has been sacrificed on altar of green politics amid Middle East war
item.description: OPINION: The myopic green dream of Energy Minister Chris Bowen and his co-cabinet ideologues has left us all exposed.

item.title: Army veteran shoots dead eight children, seven of them his own, in US neighbourhood
item.description: Two adult women were also shot and remain in critical conditions.

item.title: Jim Chalmers to target intergenerational wealth and NDIS affordability in federal budget
item.description: The treasurer has pointed to reforms in the tax system and housing market to level the playing field.

item.title: Price of Norco milk rises at supermarkets nationally as farmers face ‘unprecedented’ costs
item.description: The products are sold at Woolworths, Coles, ALDI and other supermarkets across the country.

item.title: Thousands more Australian gay and bisexual men allowed to donate blood under major rule change
item.description: ‘We hope many more people will feel welcomed in our donor centres from today.’

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor scandal: Royal expert reveals two things that made the former prince ‘different’
item.description: A royal expert has revealed the two things that made Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor ‘different’ from the rest of the royal family.

item.title: One Nation suffers kick to popularity as polling numbers puts Coalition back in second place
item.description: Two opinion polls show the party slipping from its recent highs.

item.title: Heartbreak as three-legged dog Pixel returned to shelter after just one night
item.description: The RSPCA is appealing to the public to make informed decisions after three-legged dog Pixel, who had been at a shelter for 145 days, was returned just one day after adoption.

item.title: Man critically injured in Brisbane worksite accident
item.description: Both police and paramedics are at the worksite.

item.title: Deadly mushrooms spreading across backyards as weather cools down
item.description: ‘It potentially can cause death if ingested.’

item.title: FutureBall: Double the luck for Aussie punters with launch of ‘most winnable lottery’
item.description: Aussies will be celebrating the launch of a new Lotto game that promises a fresh twist and better odds of bagging a life-changing win.

item.title: Japan earthquake: Tsunami warning issued after 7.7-magnitude shock off northeast coast
item.description: Tsunami warnings are in place and authorities have urged people to seek higher ground.

item.title: Home truths: Where in NSW it is possible to buy a property under $700,000
item.description: It is no secret Sydney is the most expensive city in the country to buy a home. These are the top areas for first homebuyers.

item.title: Baby food products in supermarkets failing global nutritional guidelines
item.description: ‘This is literally dessert in a pouch’.

item.title: Middle East war: Doubts over peace talks between Iran and US after violence flares in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The tenuous ceasefire is due to expire in less than two days.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: US President Donald Trump announces 10-day Lebanon ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah with six-point plan
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Ventura bus driver sacked after schoolboy, 12, pulled 350m down Melbourne street
item.description: The Melbourne boy escaped serious physical injury, but his mother said he remains deeply affected.

item.title: Home And Away: Meet the two new arrivals set to call Summer Bay home
item.description: Love, heartbreak and plenty of surprises are set to hit Home and Away.

item.title: Melrose Place and Days of Our Lives star Patrick Muldoon dies ‘suddenly’ aged 57
item.description: ‘Today we woke up and realised yesterday was not just a bad dream.’

item.title: US singer D4vd charged with murder and sexual abuse of 14-year-old girl Celeste Rivas Hernandez
item.description: The decomposed remains of Celeste Rivas Hernandez were discovered in the singer’s abandoned Tesla.

item.title: Shooting at Teotihuacan Pyramids in Mexico kills Canadian tourist and leaves six injured
item.description: Dozens of shots were reportedly fired as people ran for their lives.

item.title: Man dies following forklift accident at Brisbane worksite
item.description: Paramedics rushed to the site but despite their best efforts couldn’t save the man.

item.title: King Charles delivers emotional tribute to celebrate Queen Elizabeth’s 100th birthday
item.description: The King said many events around the world today would have ‘troubled her deeply’.

item.title: Cash making a comeback as Aussies turn to notes and coins for range of transactions
item.description: How often Aussies use physical currency might surprise you.

item.title: Electoral Commission of South Australia braced for damning independent review
item.description: The watchdog is under pressure after missing votes, tech failures and booths opening late.

item.title: Man dies after e-bike crash with bus in Perth as legislation change touted across Australia
item.description: The tragedy occurred weeks after the WA government called for ‘urgent national reform’ on e-bikes.

item.title: Questions about singer D4vd’s song lyrics after he was charged with murder in death of teen girl
item.description: The victim’s decomposed body was found in the trunk of a Tesla registered to the 21-year-old.

item.title: IGA trials ‘Community Check-In’ lane in Sydney to bring back human interaction at the register
item.description: ‘We noticed many shoppers were actively choosing the staffed checkouts.’

item.title: Fresh details emerge after veteran shot dead eight children in Louisiana
item.description: Police have aired what they believe sparked the tragedy.

item.title: Caretaker Dragons coach Dean Young benches Shane Flanagan’s son, Kyle, for Anzac Day clash
item.description: The caretaker coach is not mucking around as he auditions for the full-time position.

item.title: I wrote about being rejected from Meghan Markle’s Sydney retreat. The internet response was exactly what you’d expect
item.description: The online response reveals just how quickly ‘empowerment’ can turn into something else.

item.description: The commission says the ‘operational’ issues have not affected the integrity of the state election.

item.description: ‘Someone could have been killed quite easily.’

item.description: ‘His positive outlook was an inspiration to many.’

item.title: Geelong small forward Tyson Stengle’s AFL future in serious doubt
item.description: A medical model is preventing him from playing and he ‘simply isn’t talking to people closest to him’.

item.title: Tradie shortage threatens Australia's housing dream as modular homes emerge as revolutionary solution
item.description: Australia is falling behind its five-year construction target, threatening the dreams of aspiring homeowners.

item.description: The mother and daughter team from Queensland went head-to-head with their builder on Tuesday night.

item.title: AFL’s Opening Round concept to be permanently scrapped and replaced by ‘Hallelujah Round 1’

item.description: Even divorced from the late singer’s complicated legacy, this listless slog is not worthy of yours or anyone’s time.

item.description: The four children are accused of bashing a man in high-vis as he lay on the ground screaming help.

item.title: E-scooter hire ditched in Hobart over safety and behavioural concerns
item.description: The hire service has been banned after more than 37 deaths nationwide already this decade.

item.title: Traffic fines issued by an AI-camera dismissed in WA
item.description: More than $1 million in fines were wiped out due to the AI-powered camera.

item.title: Moana Pasifika ‘tragedy’ inspires ex-Wallabies captain to consider NRL defection with PNG Chiefs
item.description: The 110-Test great is plotting a move ‘home’ for a cause close to his heart.

item.title: Benji Marshall details ‘confidence issues’ behind decision to drop Wests Tigers teen prodigy Heamasi Makasini
item.description: The Tigers coach has called out an ‘unfair’ aspect of the 18-year-old’s ‘awesome’ start to his career.

item.title: Health Minister Mark Butler reveals NDIS overhaul and how federal government will rein in growth
item.description: Mark Butler will target the scheme’s out-of-control growth while admitting Australians need ‘more ID to get into a licensed club than to be an NDIS provider’.

item.title: Deadloch and Offspring actress Alicia Gardiner accused of ‘breaking the girl code’ in alleged assault
item.description: The actor has fronted a Melbourne court, charged over grabbing a security guard in a compromising spot.

item.title: Mystery as Volkswagen van towing vessel on trailer pulled from Currumbin Creek on Gold Coast
item.description: The vehicle and boat had spent more than two years underwater and were caked in mud and marine life.

item.description: ‘We’re seeing our fuels start to dry out and ... get ready to carry fire through the landscape.’

item.description: Weeks after exposing the dark truth behind her marriage, the estranged wife of a Sydney dentist shot dead by police has shared a new chapter in her life.

item.description: A remote town with fewer than 50 people is now at the centre of a growing push to boost Australia’s fuel supply.

item.description: Victor Wembanyama laid on the floor for around 30 seconds before attempting to stagger to his feet.

item.description: She had just been picked up from daycare and was walking home with her family when the tragic accident happened.

item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Australia secures another four cargo ships worth of diesel, Anthony Albanese and Chris Bowen announce
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Chelsea sack manager Liam Rosenior amid worst goalscoring drought in over a century
item.description: The famous club has issued a statement just a day after another humiliating loss.

item.title: Geelong superstar Bailey Smith receives high praise from Giants gun Tom Green: ‘Forever grateful’
item.description: ‘I’ll be forever grateful to him.’

item.title: Smart returns to its roots with tiny two-seat EV
item.description: Since becoming a Geely/Mercedes-Benz joint venture, all of Smart's vehicles have been rather large, but the new #2 is a return to tiny.

item.title: Teenage passenger killed in e-bike crash in South Morang, Melbourne
item.description: Another boy was taken to hospital in a stable condition.

item.title: Veteran radio host James Valentine dies aged 64 by voluntary assisted dying following cancer battle
item.description: The popular presenter revealed his shock diagnosis in 2024.

item.title: What Level 3 in Australia’s National Fuel Security Plan actually means, and how it could affect you
item.description: ‘We’ve got to prepare for the possibility that this will get worse before it gets better.’

item.title: AFL tech war heats up as Carlton poach Collingwood’s artificial intelligence guru
item.description: The AFL’s tech war is raging but fans want real answers to some very simple questions.

item.title: NSW Premier Chris Minns responds to Australians reportedly fuming over Anzac Day public holiday
item.description: ‘I think there’s a few states that are lagging behind.’

item.title: Perth traffic: Motorists crawling as crashes on Narrows, Tonkin Highway, Kwinana Freeway trigger congestion
item.description: Commuters are crawling across Perth this morning with crashes on the Narrows Bridge, Tonkin Highway and Kwinana Freeway triggering heavy congestion.

item.title: Oscar Piastri weighs in on F1 rival Max Verstappen’s situation: ‘Not a great look’
item.description: The Aussie says it will be a ‘big loss’ if the champion walks away from the sport.

item.title: Sprint champion Lachlan Kennedy throws gauntlet down to freshly minted Aussie Eddie Nketia
item.description: The 100m champion has the wood over Gout Gout, but Australia’s latest sensation is a different beast altogether.
